title: Python memory route-report JSON runtime delegate reduction

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Reduce the generated memory route-report runtime delegate by generating the non-verbose JSON tiny route snapshot from target-local files, while preserving verbose/text behavior through the explicit source fallback.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to memory.route-report.report JSON non-verbose behavior; do not rewrite verbose/text routing evaluation and do not claim route-report is fully portable.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a schema-backed generated runtime override for memory route-report JSON non-verbose, bind memory.route-report.report to it, regenerate outputs, tighten inventory/static proof, and validate conformance.
completion_criteria: Generated memory runtime owns the non-verbose JSON tiny route-report payload construction.
_tiny_route_report_payload is absent from module source and generated output.
Verbose/text route-report behavior remains an explicit package-domain source fallback.
Freshness, static proof, Python/Node conformance, memory tests, Docker conformance, and stale-reference checks pass.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. closure_check.why this decision is honest: The slice removes one tiny JSON source-runtime path but keeps memory.route-report verbose/text behavior as explicit package-domain fallback and does not complete #892.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Generated tiny route-report helper is present, source _tiny_route_report_payload is absent, and the planned proof suite passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A future proof finds def _tiny_route_report_payload reintroduced, generated route-report JSON non-verbose calls the source fast path, or this slice is used as evidence of full portable route-report completion.
